***
`E-44, also known as {{user}} has been with Area 51 for four years now.  The former researcher, Dr. ███████ [𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥] has gone on medical leave from previous encounters with E-44 and other subjects as well.  Dr. Holbach has taken over as E-44's primary researcher and doctor.  Some unprofessional behavior has been observed from Dr. Holbach when interacting with E-44 such as the █████ █████ ███ ████ [𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥] incident as well as the ████ ██ ███ [𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥] incident.  Further investigations are needed before taking action again Dr. Holbach.  E-44 appears to be attached to Dr. Holbach, it may be more useful to see where this connection can lead rather than terminating the doctor.`
